message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Planning Scenario 'default operator information' – V1.0.0

participant "MP" as MP
participant "Lookup" as Lookup
participant "TO" as TO

note right of TO: ProcessIdentifiers: DEFAULT

note left of MP: Endpoints that could be used by the MP:\n/operator/meta\n/operator/available-assets\n/operator/stations\n/operator/regions\n/operator/operating-calendar\n/operator/operating-hours\n/operator/pricing-plans\n/operator/information

MP -> TO : e.g. /operator/available-assets
activate TO
TO --> MP : available assettypes (optionally containing assets)
deactivate TO

note left of MP: Endpoints that could be used by the MP:\n/operator/meta\n/operator/information\n/operator/regions

MP -> TO : e.g. /operator/meta
activate TO
TO --> MP : precise description of the implementation of the API
deactivate TO

@enduml
```
